parameters.name: vdd
parameters.override_behavior: sets the voltage-coded high level of pulse

parameters.name: vth
parameters.override_behavior: sets the logic decision threshold for clk and en

parameters.name: tr
parameters.override_behavior: sets the rise and fall smoothing time of pulse

modeling_constraints: AMS role: enable-qualified clock/control pulse gate for sampled-data timing.
Derive logic decisions from vth and the output high level from vdd.
Do not add undeclared state, ports, artifacts, or validation-only behavior.
problem_statement: the supplied system violates the public contract

properties.observable_contract: pulse approaches vdd whenever both clk and en are above vth.
pulse approaches 0 V whenever either clk or en is below vth.
Changing en gates the observed clock level without creating a high output while clk is logically low.
pulse uses voltage-coded 0 V and vdd levels with finite transition smoothing set by tr.

title: Enable Gated Clock Pulse
